title: OpenAI launches o1 reasoning models
titleJa: OpenAIが推論特化モデル o1 を発表
summary: New reasoning models with improved math, coding, and science performance.

title: Anthropic introduces computer use for Claude
titleJa: AnthropicがClaudeのコンピュータ操作機能を発表
summary: Claude can interact with desktop environments via screenshots and mouse/keyboard.

title: Google releases Gemini 2.0
summary: Multimodal agentic model with 1M context and native tool use.

title: Meta releases Llama 3.3 70B
summary: Open-weight model matching 405B performance at lower cost.

title: EU AI Act enters into force
summary: European AI regulation impacts foundation model providers and deployers.

title: NVIDIA announces Blackwell architecture
titleJa: NVIDIAがBlackwellアーキテクチャを発表
summary: Next-gen AI chips with 2.5x training and 5x inference improvement over Hopper.

title: Perplexity tests sponsored answers
titleJa: Perplexityがスポンサー回答をテスト
summary: Monetization experiment for AI search with labeled sponsored content.

title: OpenAI raises $6.6B at $157B valuation
titleJa: OpenAIが評価額1570億ドルで66億ドル調達
summary: Largest private funding round in tech history.
